'''lazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wonderingly|wonderingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-zh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wonderingly|wonderingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:lazhate|lazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lazhatesher|lazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lazhatesherĂ«m|lazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lazhatero|lazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lazhateshĂ«|lazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lazhateshĂ«m|lazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilazhatero|gokilazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilazhateshĂ«|gokilazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilazhateshĂ«m|gokilazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golazhankerom|golazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golazhankeshĂ«|golazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golazhankeshĂ«m|golazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golazhankeya|golazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lazhaterom|lazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lazhatemu|lazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lazhateya|lazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilazhaterom|gokilazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilazhatemu|gokilazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilazhateya|gokilazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lazhazhate|lazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lazhazhatesher|lazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lazhazhatesherĂ«m|lazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lazhazhatero|lazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lazhazhateshĂ«|lazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lazhazhateshĂ«m|lazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilazhazhatero|gokilazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilazhazhateshĂ«|gokilazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilazhazhateshĂ«m|gokilazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golazhazhankerom|golazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golazhazhankeshĂ«|golazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golazhazhankeshĂ«m|golazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golazhazhankeya|golazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lazhazhaterom|lazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lazhazhatemu|lazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lazhazhateya|lazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilazhazhaterom|gokilazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilazhazhatemu|gokilazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilazhazhateya|gokilazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠzhĂŠte|lĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠzhĂŠtesher|lĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠzhĂŠtero|lĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokilĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|golĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|golĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠzhĂŠterom|lĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠzhĂŠtemu|lĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠzhĂŠteya|lĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokilĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokilĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafzhafte|lafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafzhaftesher|lafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafzhaftesherĂ«m|lafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafzhaftero|lafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafzhafteshĂ«|lafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafzhafteshĂ«m|lafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafzhaftero|gokilafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafzhafteshĂ«|gokilafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafzhafteshĂ«m|gokilafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafzhafnkerom|golafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafzhafnkeshĂ«|golafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafzhafnkeshĂ«m|golafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafzhafnkeya|golafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafzhafterom|lafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafzhaftemu|lafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafzhafteya|lafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafzhafterom|gokilafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafzhaftemu|gokilafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafzhafteya|gokilafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
